name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
description: Kanbantic issue lifecycle skills: intake (report / request / propose), triage, prepare, execute, review — all artifacts via Kanbantic MCP. v2.7.0 ships a zero-dependency git credential helper (KBT-B330): the lane-skills (execute / review / prepare) no longer clone with the PAT embedded in the URL — which persisted the plaintext secret into .git/config — and instead configure `credential.helper` so git fetches the token just-in-time from Kanbantic's get_repository_credential over stdin. The PAT never lands in .git/config, a remote URL, shell history, the process list, or the agent transcript (the helper, not the agent, calls get_repository_credential). See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.7.0.md. v2.6.0 adds a readiness-gate override governance flag in the stdio proxy (KBT-F341 / KBT-E069): a successful update_issue_status / claim_issue carrying an overrideReason now triggers a greppable [override-governance] Comment on the affected issue for second-party review. Transparent-bridge preserved (response forwarded verbatim; flag is a fire-and-forget side-effect); opt out with KANBANTIC_SKIP_OVERRIDE_FLAG=1. Companion server-side preventive controls tracked under KBT-E069. v2.5.1 narrows /kanbantic-sync-workspace-skills materialization to Skill+Subagent only (KBT-B250 / KBT-BD086): Command toolkit-items are reference-only snippets and intentionally stay Toolkit-only — v2.5.0 silently exposed them as slash-commands under .claude/commands/, polluting the namespace. v2.5.0 adds /kanbantic-sync-workspace-skills (KBT-F265 / KBT-TRUL014): materializes the active workspace's Toolkit Skill / Subagent items as on-disk `.claude/commands/*.md` and `.claude/agents/*.md` mirrors with a `.kanbantic-sync.json` manifest for drift detection. Companion to Kanbantic API change KBT-F264 (bootstrap_agent now also returns skills/commands/subagents/customs arrays). v2.4.2 patches lane-skill SKILL.md mechanical inconsistencies (KBT-B192 / KBT-RL064). v2.4.1 adds a real-proxy regression test + bundle ↔ live MCP-registry drift detector (KBT-B200). v2.4.0 introduces Phase-of-Features-of-Tasks Epic shape (KBT-F250). v2.3.0 introduced InDeployment (KBT-F236), v2.2.0 introduced Prepared (KBT-F235). See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.6.0.md.
